# dotnet-version-upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net9.0 using the All-at-Once strategy. Applying full C# modernization including minimal hosting model, nullable reference types, file-scoped namespaces, and records.

**Progress**: 3/4 tasks complete (75%) ![75%](https://progress-bar.xyz/75)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-project-config: Update project file
- ✅ 02-minimal-hosting: Migrate to minimal hosting model
- ✅ 03-csharp-modernization: Apply C# 12 modernization
- 🔄 04-validate: Build and test validation
